title: NodeHistoryScoreEvent
description: Telemetry event capturing history-driven scoring for candidate dungeon nodes.

version.description: Monotonic event version for this telemetry family.

runId.description: RunContract identifier associated with this scoring decision.

regionRef.description: Region contract reference for the current run.

patternId.description: History-selector or pattern identifier that provided weights and legend bands.

baseScore.description: Initial base score before any bonuses or penalties.

liminalBonus.description: Configured liminal bonus weight applied when node is liminal or matches preferred liminal tags.

preferredBonus.description: Bonus applied when node has any preferred hooks or liminal tags.

discouragedPenalty.description: Penalty applied when node has any discouraged hooks.

perMatchingHook.description: Increment per preferred mechanic hook on the node.

perDiscouragedHook.description: Penalty per discouraged mechanic hook on the node.

forbiddenPenalty.description: Penalty applied when node carries any forbidden tags.

historyScale.description: Scalar weight applied to the historyCoupling value.

nPreferredHooks.description: Count of node mechanic hooks that match preferredHooks in the pattern.

nDiscouragedHooks.description: Count of node mechanic hooks that match discouragedHooks in the pattern.

isLiminalRole.description: True if node.role is considered liminal (liminal or threshold).

historyCoupling.description: Computed spectral-history coupling in [0,1] for this node against legend bands.

finalScore.description: Final combined score used to rank this node.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) when this score was computed.
